info.description: This is a sample server API for Go App.
info.title: Go App API

post.description: Send OTP to email for password reset
Verify OTP and return reset token
Validate OTP sent to user email
Get new access token using refresh token

get.description: Get a list of channels for the current user

post.description: Add one or more members to a channel

delete.description: Remove a specific member from a channel

get.description: Get unread message counts for a user

delete.description: Delete chat history in a channel up to a sequence

get.description: Get a list of members in a specific channel
Get the number of members in a specific channel
Get messages in a channel with pagination
Get connections for the current user, optionally filtered by status

put.description: Accept or reject a connection request

post.description: Create a new group along with channel, members, and unreads

put.description: Update information of an existing group

delete.description: Delete a group by its ID

post.description: Create a new message in a channel

get.description: Get a single message by ID

post.description: Hide a message for current user

get.description: Get a list of all roles

post.description: Generate a presigned URL for file upload

get.description: Get user information by their ID
